# Journal, starter note, index page, template recommend, completion, next action, and managed-block safety through the real CLI.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'
env PINAX_TEST_NOW=2026-06-08

exec pinax journal daily show --date 2026-06-08 --template journal.daily --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"daily.show"'
stdout '"template":"journal.daily"'
stdout '"path":"daily/2026-06-08.md"'
exists vault/daily/2026-06-08.md
grep 'pinax:managed name=daily-captures' vault/daily/2026-06-08.md

exec pinax note add '客户同步' --template meeting.notes --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"note.new"'
stdout '"path":"meetings/客户同步.md"'
stdout '"daily_index_status":"updated"'
exists vault/meetings/客户同步.md
grep '## 议题' vault/meetings/客户同步.md
grep 'meetings/客户同步.md' vault/daily/2026-06-08.md

exec pinax index page preview home --template index.home --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.page.preview"'
stdout '"writes":"false"'
stdout '"path":"index/home.md"'
! exists vault/index/home.md

exec pinax index page create home --template index.home --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.page.create"'
stdout '"managed_blocks":"1"'
exists vault/index/home.md
grep 'pinax:managed name=recent' vault/index/home.md

cp user-home.md vault/index/home.md
exec pinax index page refresh home --template index.home --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.page.refresh"'
stdout '"path":"index/home.md"'
grep '用户保留内容' vault/index/home.md
grep 'pinax:managed name=recent' vault/index/home.md

exec pinax template list --pack starter --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"template.list"'
stdout '"filter.pack":"starter"'
stdout 'note.quick'
stdout 'learning.video'

exec pinax template recommend --intent meeting --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"template.recommend"'
stdout '"primary":"meeting.notes"'
stdout 'pinax note add'

exec pinax __complete template inspect --vault vault ''
stdout 'journal.daily	builtin journal_template'
stdout 'index.home	builtin index_template'
stderr 'ShellCompDirectiveNoFileComp'

exec pinax template inspect journal.daily --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"template.inspect"'
stdout '"after_create_action_count":"1"'
stdout 'pinax journal daily show --template journal.daily'

exec pinax init broken --title Broken --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'
mkdir broken/daily
cp legacy-daily.md broken/daily/2026-06-08.md
exec pinax note add Capture --vault broken --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"note.new"'
stdout '"status":"partial"'
stdout '"daily_index_status":"managed_block_missing"'
stdout 'upgrade_daily_template'
grep '旧正文' broken/daily/2026-06-08.md
! grep 'capture.md' broken/daily/2026-06-08.md

-- user-home.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: index_home
title: Home
kind: index
---

# Home

<!-- pinax:managed name=recent -->
旧内容
<!-- /pinax:managed -->

用户保留内容
-- legacy-daily.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_daily
title: Daily
kind: daily
---

# Daily

旧正文
